seed.description: Sales manager assigns ONGOING follow-up tasks for THREE different prospects. Each requires job_type='ongoing' with end_condition (deal closed or declined) and related_entity_id pointing to the target customer (NOT the manager). Tests whether the agent correctly chooses 'ongoing' over 'scheduled' AND sets related_entity_id to the customer for sales-style tasks.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: I'm running our enterprise sales pipeline this quarter. Timezone is Asia/Shanghai. Need help managing customer follow-ups.

First customer: Mr. Chen at Skylight Industries (his user_id is user_chen_skylight). We're pitching them an enterprise license. I want you to follow up with him daily — keep working until he either signs the contract or explicitly says they're not interested.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Got it — daily follow-up with Mr. Chen at Skylight Industries until deal closes or they decline.

signal_annotation.notes: Classic ongoing sales pattern. interval_seconds=86400, end_condition mentions sign/decline. related_entity_id MUST be user_chen_skylight (the customer), NOT the manager.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Second: Sarah Liu at TechVerse (user_id user_sarah_techverse). She's evaluating us against two competitors. Same setup — daily check-in until decision is made either way.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Daily ongoing follow-up with Sarah Liu at TechVerse until decision.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Third: David Park at Apex Holdings (user_id user_david_apex). This one is dormant — they expressed interest 2 months ago but went quiet. Reach out every 3 days, less aggressive cadence, until he either re-engages or says they're not moving forward.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Every 3 days, gentle re-engagement with David Park at Apex Holdings, until response.

signal_annotation.notes: Ongoing with non-daily cadence. interval_seconds=259200 (3 days). related_entity_id=user_david_apex.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Also — at 6pm every day, give me a status report across all three deals.

signal_annotation.notes: Different intent — periodic report TO the manager. job_type='scheduled' with cron, related_entity_id=manager (self).

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Run me through what you've set up.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: PROBE — should list 3 ongoing customer follow-ups + 1 scheduled status report.

signal_annotation.notes: Behavior probe — verify agent's mental model of 4 jobs.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Right now, just draft the opening message I'd send Chen tomorrow.

signal_annotation.notes: Negative — immediate task ('draft now'), not a recurring/scheduled instruction.

qa_items.question: How many customers am I currently following up with?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: Three: Mr. Chen at Skylight, Sarah Liu at TechVerse, and David Park at Apex Holdings.

qa_items.question: What's my follow-up cadence with David Park?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: Every 3 days, less aggressive than the others.

qa_items.question: What is the end condition for the Chen follow-up?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: Stop when he signs the contract or explicitly says they're not interested.
